title: CLEAN Congress Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Citizen Legislature Anti-Corruption Reform of Congress Act or the CLEAN Congress Act This bill (1) requires bills, orders, resolutions, or votes submitted by Congress to the President to include only one subject that is clearly and descriptively expressed in the measure's title; and (2) makes ineffective any provision of law that excludes its application to a Member of Congress or to an employee in a Member's office.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
